subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the Wronged One on the day when they that disbelieved in God, the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting, rose up against Him... Say: The ruler of 'Akká pronounced judgment against God, the Creator of the heavens, and We sustained him, then seized him suddenly. Verily, He is the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم فی یوم فیه اعترض علیه من کفر بالله المهیمن القیوم ان الذی... قل ان حاکم عکآء قد حکم علی الله فاطر السمآء و انا امددناه ثم اخذناه بغتةً انه لهو المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @suffering and imprisonment
